carbon.$description: Carbon — Page canvas and section backgrounds — near-true-black maximizes the contrast pop of white type and saturated accent blocks

bone.$description: Bone — Primary text, display headlines, borders, and link strokes — the only voice for the majority of the page

voltage-cyan.$description: Voltage Cyan — Accent card backgrounds, highlight panels — flat saturated cyan that screams against the dark canvas, reserved for project cards and editorial callout blocks

plasma-magenta.$description: Plasma Magenta — Display text on cyan cards, decorative script flourishes — hot pink/magenta used only as ink-on-cyan contrast or as editorial accent

ember.$description: Ember — Supporting palette color for small decorative accents when the core palette needs contrast.

azeret-mono.$description: Monospace system voice — navigation, metadata, UI labels, footer text. Brings a developer-terminal identity that matches the frontend-developer positioning

azeretmono-display-variant.$description: Oversized condensed display headlines (ROU HUN FAN, UI DEV, DESIGN, MOTION & FRONTEND). The extreme scale and bold weight turn the page into a typographic poster — type IS the design

ephidona.$description: Calligraphic editorial script for section labels (PROJECTS). Counter-typography that breaks the geometric/mono discipline with human handwriting — the anti-machine flourish that signals personal craft over automated output

carbon-canvas.$description: Surface level 0: Full-bleed page background, section bands

voltage-card.$description: Surface level 1: Featured project cards, editorial callout panels

image-plate.$description: Surface level 2: Photo containers, embedded media blocks
